description: The current Oracle Database instance is configured with Redo Log groups that are too small (50MB), causing frequent log switches and performance degradation. Resize the Online Redo Logs so that the database has exactly three redo log groups of 512MB each. Ensure the original 50MB groups are removed and the new 512MB groups are active. Connect as the System user (password: OraclePassword123) or as SYSDBA.
